themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And he shall sprinkle of the blood of the sin offering upon the side of the altar; and the re...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְהַנִּשְׁאָ֣ר: and the rest - properly, to swell up, i.e., be (causatively, make) redundant".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "How does understanding the purpose behind God's laws help you obey Him from the heart rather...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוֹ֣ת: by the commandments - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".
